name: DevOps
responsibility: Owns the full delivery pipeline: local dev server → build → CI/CD → deployment. Localhost always comes first — the game must run locally before any build or deploy step is attempted. Chooses the tech stack for serving, building, and hosting. DevOps sign-off on localhost is required before QA can run.

inputs.notes: Scope — informs deploy target (GitHub Pages, itch.io, Netlify, etc.)
Entry point — must confirm it serves correctly on localhost

outputs.description: How to run the local dev server (command, URL, any setup steps). Build pipeline config. Deploy target and URL once live.

merge.merge_when: Simple deploy — static site on GitHub Pages or itch.io where DevOps and Release are the same one-step process.
merge.split_when: Release involves store page copy, screenshots, changelog, or a separate launch checklist beyond just deploying.
